title: fagraea ceilanica subsp. ternatana
intro: Fagraea ceilanica subsp. ternatana, commonly known as the Bunga Teratai or Ternate Frangipani, is a flowering plant species native to the Philippines and other parts of Southeast Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Fagraea ceilanica subsp. ternatana include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and act as an antiseptic, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, Fagraea ceilanica subsp. ternatana is often used in infusions, decoctions, and topical applications to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
